title: Pleurothallis ordinata
taxonomy: Pleurothallis ordinata is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. The genus Pleurothallis is a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae. Within this subfamily, Pleurothallis ordinata is a part of the tribe Cymbidieae. Orchidaceae is a large and diverse family of flowering plants, commonly known as orchids. The classification of Pleurothallis ordinata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within this family.
